creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Yuri,

Am good. I don't think this is the correct case. The `py-` prefix has nothing to do with being a library or a program. It has to do with the flavors and different versions.

Please have a look at:
https://wiki.freebsd.org/Python/PortsPolicy#Prefixing_.28py-.2A.29

For more details.
